user.title: AH Shopping
user.description:
Connect to Albert Heijn via the unofficial Appie API.

• **anonymous** – product search and bonus (no login)
• **authenticated** – receipts, AH shopping lists, optional orders

Tokens stay private in Home Assistant. Ordering/checkout is disabled by default.

oauth.title: OAuth Login
oauth.description:
Open this URL in your browser and log in:

{oauth_url}

After login, copy the code from `appie://login-exit?code=...` (browser error is normal).

Paste the code below. Codes expire quickly.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the AH API.

data.experimental_order_enabled: Experimental order/cart API (read/write cart, NO checkout)
data.experimental_checkout_enabled: Experimental checkout (NOT implemented – do not enable)
